name: gomu
description: Visualize mutex lock scopes in Go with rainbow-style scope highlighting.

gomu.lineOpacity.markdownDescription: Opacity of the scope lines, from 0% (fully transparent) to 100% (fully opaque).

gomu.lineWidth.markdownDescription: Thickness of the scope lines in pixels.

gomu.lineSpacing.markdownDescription: Horizontal clear space between nested scope lines in pixels (independent of line width).

gomu.baseOffset.markdownDescription: Horizontal distance in pixels between the code and the outermost scope line (the length of the bracket's foot).
